web_results.title: Top 9 AI Agent Frameworks as of February 2026 | Shakudo
web_results.description: Because it sits on top of the Shakudo Operating System, every agent inherits secure VPC networking, role-based access control, and 200+ turnkey connectors for tools such as Qdrant, Supabase, and Weights & Biases. This makes it especially appealing to mid-market and enterprise companies that want to keep data and compute within their own cloud while still moving fast. The framework shines in scenarios that need long-running or hierarchical agents, like revenue-ops copilots that read Salesforce data, compliance review bots that chain retrieval-augmented-generation steps, or customer-support triage agents that talk to both a knowledge base and ticketing API.

web_results.title: New Relic launches new AI agent platform and OpenTelemetry tools | TechCrunch
web_results.description: The company said its application performance monitoring (APM) agents are now equipped with OTel capabilities, letting enterprises manage OTel data streams alongside their other data sources in one place. This is aimed at solving a previous fragmentation problem that was holding up mass enterprise adoption of the OTel framework.
